agent.status: Members now get told when a captain pauses or retires their game - an email with the reason and when it's back, plus a clear 'paused, back by DATE' badge on their games list. Before this the game just went silent and looked broken.
agent.direction: That's the pause/retire gap closed. Next: the high-value Tier 3 items - link previews for sharing, and a couple of small map/registration dead-ends
